shared_properties: Canvas target is 1280x720 px at 60 fps.
Core palette copy is embedded in this file with primary #3D2B1F, background #E8D5C4, accent #D4A843.
Outline stroke uses 2 px dark brown edge color #3D2B1F.
differences: This asset defines the upper UI skeleton for status readouts and buttons.

context.usage: Persistent HUD frame for stage title, moves, undo, restart, and menu controls.

notes: Inner padding is 16 px on left and right edges.
Title slot width is 200 px and moves slot width is 120 px.

shape.silhouette: full-width top frame strip with centered title slot and separated status cells

deliverables: Annotated slot layout preview for title, moves, undo, restart, and menu areas.
Nine-slice compatible export with 4 px corner markers.
acceptance_criteria: HUD frame size is exactly 1280x50 px.
Title slot width is 200 px and moves slot width is 120 px.
Accent separators use #D4A843 and remain visible at 100% zoom.
